div.p: Technical Specification: Linux Kernel io_uring + IORING_OP_SEND_ZC Requirement: Zero-copy requires memory persistence until notification.
In non-ZC sends, completion (Step 4) implies memory can be reused. In Zero-Copy sends, memory MUST NOT be modified until the Notification CQE arrives.

ol.li: Data Corruption: NIC reads partial data while app writes.
Kernel Panic: DMA occurs on unmapped/freed memory addresses.
